name: kismet-capture-hak5-wifi-coconut
title: kismet-capture-hak5-wifi-coconut
summary: Kismet capture helper for WiFi Coconut
description:
Kismet capture helper for WiFi Coconut
Kismet is a wireless network and device detector, sniffer, wardriving tool,
and WIDS (wireless intrusion detection) framework.
.
Kismet works with Wi-Fi interfaces, Bluetooth interfaces, some SDR (software
defined radio) hardware like the RTLSDR, and other specialized capture
hardware.
.
This package contains the Kismet Hak5 WiFi Coconut capture helper.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use kismet_cap_hak5_wifi_coconut because Kismet capture helper for WiFi Coconut.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use kismet_cap_hak5_wifi_coconut as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `kismet_cap_hak5_wifi_coconut [options] [args]` as documented upstream for kismet_cap_hak5_wifi_coconut.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair kismet_cap_hak5_wifi_coconut with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `kismet_cap_hak5_wifi_coconut --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
